ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (q:Question {uuid: 123})-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: 'programming'}),
    p2 = (q)-[:ASKED]->(u:User {uuid: 123})-[:PROVIDED]->(a:Answer {is_accepted: true}),
    p3 = (q)-[:ANSWERED]->(a2:Answer {uuid: 456})-[:COMMENTED_ON]->(c:Comment {score: 5})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How does the programming-focused question with answer ID 123 reflect the broader engagement trends among users like UUID 123, specifically in terms of accepted answers and high-scoring comments?

cypher:
MATCH (q:Question {link: 'programming-focused question with answer ID 123'})<-[:ASKED]-(u:User {uuid: 123})
OPTIONAL MATCH (u)-[:COMMENTED]->(c:Comment)<-[:COMMENTED_ON]-(q)
WITH q, COUNT(c) AS comment_count, COLLECT(c.score) AS comment_scores
RETURN q.title AS question_title, q.link AS question_link, comment_count, comment_scores
